description: A wide candid press photograph of the White House coal-industry event (no graphic overlay applied to the image itself). The shot looks across the ornate East Room of the White House: massive crystal chandeliers hang from the white coffered ceiling, gold drapery and a large portrait (of George Washington) line the walls, and a seated audience fills the foreground, including a cluster of coal miners in white hard hats at left. President Trump stands at a podium in the middle distance beside a long row of American flags. Two blue digital signage screens are visible reading 'Coal Keeps the Lights On' (with 'Lights' emphasized) and bearing a small presidential mark; these are physical event screens within the scene rather than a designed social-media graphic. Overall this is a routine event photograph documenting the 'CLEAN, BEAUTIFUL COAL!' event referenced in the tweet, not a designed meme/poster.
notable_text: Coal Keeps the Lights On. (text on the in-room event screens)
